title: allium graveolens
intro: Allium graveolens, also known as garlic chives or Chinese chives, is a perennial plant belonging to the Allium genus, which includes various species of garlic and onions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and antiviral properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight infections. The health benefits of Allium graveolens include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Allium graveolens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
